metadata.description: Collection of custom Claude Code skills for professional workflows

plugins.name: sas-presentation
plugins.description: Create polished SAS-AM branded Reveal.js presentations with light/dark mode, narrative structure, and professional layouts.

plugins.name: data-quality-analysis
plugins.description: Analyse raw data quality using the ABS Data Quality Framework. Assesses seven dimensions (institutional environment, relevance, timeliness, accuracy, coherence, interpretability, accessibility) and produces a structured markdown report with ratings and recommendations.
